project: UP Platform Phase 3: Config Generation (up sync)
description: Add 'up sync' command that generates CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, and .claude/ settings from .up/config.json and installed plugins. UP becomes the single source of truth for all AI assistant configuration.

userStories.title: ConfigRenderer base class and template system
userStories.description: Create a template rendering system that generates AI assistant config files from .up/config.json and plugin registry data.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/up/sync/__init__.py and src/up/sync/renderer.py
ConfigRenderer abstract base class with: render(config, plugins) -> str
TemplateContext dataclass: project_name, ai_rules (list), commands (list), hooks_summary (list), memory_protocol (bool), safety_rules (list)
build_context(config, registry) -> TemplateContext aggregates data from config and all enabled plugins
Unit tests in tests/test_config_renderer.py
userStories.notes: Foundation for all renderers. Keep templates as Python f-strings, no Jinja dependency needed.

userStories.title: CLAUDE.md renderer
userStories.description: Generate CLAUDE.md from template context. Includes project rules, plugin commands, memory protocol, safety instructions, and auto-triggers.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/up/sync/claude_md.py with ClaudeMdRenderer(ConfigRenderer)
Output includes sections: Quick Start, Project Structure, AI Rules, Commands (from plugins), Safety Rules, Memory Protocol, Context Budget, Auto-Triggers
Plugin commands rendered as table: Command | Description | Plugin
Plugin rules rendered as safety instructions
Memory protocol section included only if memory is configured
Adds header comment: '<!-- Generated by UP Platform. Do not edit manually. Run: up sync -->'
Unit tests comparing rendered output against expected snapshots
userStories.notes: Depends on US-001. This replaces manually maintained CLAUDE.md files.

userStories.title: Cursorrules renderer
userStories.description: Generate .cursorrules from template context. Adapts the same project rules and plugin data for Cursor IDE format.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/up/sync/cursorrules.py with CursorrulesRenderer(ConfigRenderer)
Output includes: project overview, code style rules, command reference, safety rules
Format follows Cursor's expected .cursorrules structure
Adds header comment: '# Generated by UP Platform. Do not edit manually.'
Unit tests comparing rendered output against expected snapshots
userStories.notes: Depends on US-001. Similar to CLAUDE.md but adapted for Cursor format.

userStories.title: Claude Code settings renderer
userStories.description: Generate .claude/settings.json from plugin hook configurations. Maps plugin hooks to Claude Code's native hook format.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/up/sync/claude_settings.py with ClaudeSettingsRenderer
Reads hooks from enabled plugins and converts to Claude Code hook format
Maps UP event types to Claude Code hook types: pre_tool_use -> PreToolUse, post_tool_use -> PostToolUse, etc.
Generates .claude/settings.json with hooks array and permission rules
Preserves any existing manual settings (merge, don't overwrite)
Unit tests with sample plugin hooks
userStories.notes: Depends on US-001 and Phase 1 hook system. Bridges UP plugins to Claude Code native hooks.

userStories.title: CLI command: up sync
userStories.description: Add 'up sync' command that runs all renderers and writes output files. Shows diff of changes before writing.
acceptanceCriteria: Create src/up/commands/sync_config.py (rename existing sync.py if needed)
'up sync' generates: CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules, .claude/settings.json
Shows Rich diff of changes before writing (green=added, red=removed)
Optional --dry-run flag to preview without writing
Optional --target flag to generate only specific files: --target claude-md
Reports: 'Synced 3 files from 6 plugins'
Skips files that haven't changed
userStories.notes: Depends on US-002, US-003, US-004. Main user-facing command.

userStories.title: Auto-sync on plugin install/enable/disable
userStories.description: Automatically run 'up sync' after plugin state changes so config files stay in sync.
acceptanceCriteria: After 'up plugin install', 'up plugin enable', 'up plugin disable': auto-run sync
Show message: 'Config files updated (CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules)'
Optional --no-sync flag on plugin commands to skip auto-sync
Emit SYNC_REQUESTED event through EventBridge after plugin changes
Integration test: install plugin, verify CLAUDE.md updated
userStories.notes: Depends on US-005 and Phase 1 plugin commands.

userStories.title: up init runs sync after initialization
userStories.description: Update 'up init' to run sync as final step, generating initial CLAUDE.md and .cursorrules from defaults and builtin plugins.
acceptanceCriteria: Modify src/up/commands/init.py to call sync after plugin setup
Generated CLAUDE.md includes builtin plugin rules (safety, verify)
Generated .cursorrules includes project overview and command reference
User sees: 'Generated CLAUDE.md, .cursorrules from 2 builtin plugins'
Existing init tests updated to verify generated files
userStories.notes: Depends on US-005 and Phase 1 US-012. Ties init and sync together.
